hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
accommodation_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"Great Wall Hotel"}<=accommodation_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
total_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    total_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
    total_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(total_cost<=3800)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 2 people traveling from Suzhou to Chongqing for 2 days. Requirements: satisfy any one of the following: 1. Wish to stay at the following hotel: Great Wall Hotel; 2. Total travel budget is 3800.0.
